_about: Golden price/profit traces RECORDED from the ORIGINAL Paper-1 simulation.py (the algorithmic-bertrand-rl repository) so the byte-for-byte faithfulness check runs EVERYWHERE with zero external dependency. Q-learning: fresh default_rng(seed). Mean-based: default_rng(seed) advanced by one rng.integers(0,K,size=2) draw (the documented env.reset offset) before run_meanbased.
